previous_issues_resolution.medium_6_iamensagem_type: RESOLVED. Subtask 1-4 explicitly states IaMensagem does NOT exist in shared/types.ts, documents 3 inline locations, adds new types WITHOUT removing existing ones, and defers migration to subtask 1-9.
previous_issues_resolution.medium_7_sugerir_precos: RESOLVED. Replaced with exportar_relatorio in subtask 6-4. Documented that comparar_precos already covers price history.

critique.summary: Revision 2 of the implementation plan addresses all 3 HIGH and 4 MEDIUM issues identified in the first critique. The spread-vs-array params warning is now pervasive across all relevant subtasks with explicit conversion examples. Tool names match the actual codebase exactly (verified). PGlite.create() migration has clear step-by-step guidance. Subtask splits are reasonable and reduce risk. ipcRenderer cleanup is documented with concrete patterns. The plan is well-structured with 6 phases, 33 subtasks, clear dependency graph, and correct EscalaFlow reference mapping. Ready for implementation.
recommendations: During implementation, run existing tests (npm test) after Phase 1 to catch any regressions from the PGlite upgrade before proceeding to knowledge layer work.

Consider writing a small integration test after subtask 3-4 (ingest) that exercises the full pipeline: create source -> chunk -> embed -> search, to validate the spread-vs-array conversion didn't introduce silent issues.
The global_warnings section is a good addition -- the coder agent should read it before starting any phase.
